problem.label: The problem we solve
problem.quote: 78% of businesses in Europe make financial decisions without real-time visibility.
problem.heading: Most growing companies run on spreadsheets, gut decisions, and disconnected technology.
problem.body1_pre: It's not a talent problem. It's a
problem.body1_post: problem. Without real financial systems and technology connected to your business, scaling becomes a burden — not an achievement.
problem.body2: Companies that scale don't do it by working harder — they do it with better systems, greater visibility, and decisions based on real data.

verticals.tech_heading: Digital systems that grow your business
verticals.tech_body: We don't build pages — we build business tools. Web development, e-commerce, custom software, integrations and automation with strategic purpose.
verticals.finance_heading: Total control of your numbers and your future
verticals.finance_body: Fractional CFO, KPI dashboards, 5-year financial models and operational institutionalization. Your company with real visibility and direction.
